resources.string:
感谢您信任并使用%s，我们非常重视您的隐私保护和个人信息保护，请您在使用前认真阅读%s提供的《用户条款》及《隐私政策》全部条款。对于您需要重点注意的内容，例如使用本产品会调用的权限及对应用途，以及您使用本产品时享有的权利等，我们已经在协议中进行了重点标注，建议您在操作前仔细阅读。
如您同意上述条款，请点击“同意并继续”开始使用我们的产品及服务。若点击“放弃并退出”，将无法使用我们的产品和服务，并退出本App。
Please check your inbox for password reset link
Please enter your account email to receive the password reset link
Nickname format is incorrect or contains restricted characters
The password must contain at least 8 characters with mix of letters, number, symbols
Use a mix of letters, number, and symbols in your password
Password has changed, please login again for your account security
Failed to send verification code, try again later
The verification code has expired, please re-verify
Failed to activate camera. Exit or allow use of camera on remote devices and tap \"Retry\"
"1. Ensure the network connection of your child's device 2. Awake or unlock your child's device 3. Open AirDroid Kids on your child's device"
Failed to connect AirDroid Parental Control server
Please check your network connection then try again
"Failed to start \"Remote Camera\" due to a connection failure with the child's device. Please:"
"Failed to start \"One-way Audio\" due to a connection failure with the child's device. Please:"
"Failed to start \"Screen Mirroring\" due to a connection failure with the child's device. Please:"
You are using cellular data to access the device, additional data costs may apply, continue?
This may take a while, please be patient.
"Please open AirDroid Kids on your child's device and follow the instructions to enable the corresponding permission"
1. Network communication abnormality may cause delay in SMS, if you still do not receive the verification code after 10 minutes, please click again to get the verification code.
2. Please check if the phone charge is overdue or the service is suspended, or the system message is hidden.
"3. If none of the situations above happen and you still can't receive the verification code, please contact us"
Click \"Retry\" to send request to the device again
Another family member has already responded to this request
Connection failed, please check your network
Too many attempts, try again later
"You won't be able to create an account if you cancel the verification process"
New email and password is not allowed be empty
This will be your new AirDroid account (Use the new mail to login later)
"We've sent a mail which included verification code to"
Select more photos/videos or go to \"Settings\" to allow access to all photos/videos.
请您勾选同意用户条款
Network issue or unknown error, please check your network and try again later
Unknown error, please try again later
The time is set incorrectly, please reset the system time to the correct one!
Blacklist is full. Please remove a website to add another.
Your child is back in Focus Mode.
Are you sure you want to undo this action?
This will block access to what you approved before. Are you sure you want to undo this action?
This can no longer be undone.
"%s's camera is in use. Unable to take a snapshot."
Connecting may take a moment. Thank you for your patience.
Snapshots cannot be recovered once deleted. Are you sure you want to delete all camera snapshots?
Snapshots cannot be recovered once deleted. Are you sure you want to delete all screen snapshots?
Snapshots cannot be recovered once deleted. Go ahead and delete %s camera snapshot(s)?
Snapshots cannot be recovered once deleted. Go ahead and delete %s screen snapshot(s)?
An error occurred. Failed to take a snapshot.
%s’s screen is locked. Unable to take a snapshot.
Permission to display over other apps required on %s
"Allow background pop-up notifications on %s's device to continue"
"%s's screen is in use. Unable to take a snapshot."
You can also view it later in Snapshots
"Set a custom time limit for each selected app. Approval is required when an app's time is up."
Limit the total daily usage for the selected apps. Once the time is up, your approval is needed for more time.
The free plan allows up to %s location updates per day. Subscribe for unlimited updates.
The free plan allows up to %s app limits. Subscribe to create up to %s limits.
The free plan is limited to %s apps/categories. Subscribe for unlimited selections.
"You're using a premium feature. Subscribe to unlock unlimited use."
Subscribe to AirDroid Parental Control now
Subscribe now and get extra days for FREE!
Subscribe now and get %s days for FREE!
Focus Mode has been turned off
Automatically scans new photos in Photos to identify inappropriate content, such as nudity or adult material.
Visit the URL below to install AirDroid Parental Connector:
"The current version of AirDroid Kids is too old to use this feature. Please open AirDroid Kids on your child's device and upgrade to the latest version."
Network error. Please check and retry
No apps have been used yet
Please describe the scenarios you wish to monitor, and the AI will recommend relevant keywords
"Please describe the scenario you want to monitor in detail. Example: I want to monitor my child's exposure to violent content on Facebook."
"Example: I'm concerned that my child is being bullied at school."
"We recommend focusing on specific monitoring scenarios. Example: I want to monitor my child's exposure to violent content on Facebook."
"Multiple scenarios were detected in your description. We recommend focusing on specific monitoring scenarios. Example: I want to monitor my child's exposure to violent content on Facebook."
"You've reached the daily usage limit. Please try again tomorrow."

Connection failure reports can help us identify the reasons behind connection issues, allowing us to fix bugs. The report includes data on connection failures but does not contain private information from devices such as screenshots, audio, alerts, notifications, or location. Additionally, it excludes personally identifiable information such as usernames or login emails.
Automatically send connection failure reports to help improve this application
By signing up, you accept %sTerms of Service%s and %sprivacy policy%s
The limit will be removed after deleting. Are you sure you want to delete it?
"%s Enter the above binding code in AirDroid Browser to bind your device to %s"
No new devices were detected. Please check if you have entered the correct binding code in AirDroid Browser.
"Visit the following URL on your child's device"
"Enter the key below on the dial pad of your child's device (only available on some devices)"
The AirDroid Kids icon will be hidden after installation. Please follow the steps below to open AirDroid Kids
With AirDroid Parental Control, parents can keep an eye on how their kids use their devices and help them manage their screen time.
"Before you start setting up parental supervision on your child's device, make sure the device is within your reach. You will need to perform the rest of the actions on your child's device."
The process might take 5 to 10 minutes
"%s Enter the binding code in AirDroid Kids to bind the device to %s."
"Please visit the URL in the browser of your child's device to download and install AirDroid Kids: https://%s&f=share"
"Please visit the following URL in the browser of your child's Android device to download and install AirDroid Kids."
The AirDroid Kids icon will be hidden after the installation.
Use the binding code below to bind AirDroid Kids. The code is always valid
You are the admin of this device now.
Are you sure to give up binding and quit AirDroid Parental Control?
"Sorry, we didn't detect newly bound devices. Please make sure you entered the correct binding code on AirDroid Kids."
Bind another device or tap \"Done\" to leave.
This feature is currently not supported on iOS devices
"Your child's device is currently in Focus Mode"
Please enter your AirDroid Parental Control password to verify your identity. Please note that the data cannot be restored after being cleared.
Failed to open AirDroid Kids. Please try another way
"Emergency numbers can't be added to the list"
Block the incoming and outgoing calls from blacklisted numbers
Only allow the incoming and outgoing calls from emergency numbers and whitelisted numbers
"Please get your child's permission before enabling the feature."
"Then, open AirDroid Kids on the child's device and grant the permissions required by the feature."
"Then, open AirDroid Kids on the child's device. Go to Parental Settings and grant the required permissions."
"Then, open AirDroid Kids on the child's device. Go to Parental Settings > Additional Protection Options and grant the required permissions."
Add a number to Call Blacklist
The format is incorrect. Please check.
Are you sure you want to remove %s?
Add a number to the whitelist to allow your child to always receive and call the number
"Comprehensively monitor and manage the child's calls and SMS to protect their communication and privacy."
Pair in Basic Mode for temporary use
"Connect your child's device to AirDroid Parental Connector via a USB cable"
Select \"Enable Supervision Mode\" for the iOS device, and enter the Pairing Code below
Unlock all features via AirDroid Parental Connector
"Set an Admin Code to be used to directly approve the request on the child's device"
"Please enter your password below to verify your identity. Deleting the account will make you unable to access any of AirDroid's services anymore. The account cannot be restored once deleted."
"To prevent apps from being reshuffled after the device's state transitions, turn on \"Customize Layout\" at the top right corner of the AirDroid Kids home screen."
"During downtime or when restricted, the apps on the child's device will be hidden."
Sorry, you cannot add more devices since the number of your bound devices has reached the limits.
Since the current account has purchased %s subscription, please operate in AirDroid Parental Control if you need to upgrade.
"Sorry, you cannot add more devices since the number of your bound devices has reached the limits. You can subscribe AirDroid Parental Control to bind more devices."
"Sorry, the number of your bound devices has reached the limits. Please upgrade your account to bind more devices."
Cannot find the app info or the app has been deleted
Are you sure you want to quit?
"You haven't granted permission to microphone on the child's device. Cannot start the \"One-way Audio\"."
Are you sure you want to quit?
"Please note that if your child is using the camera, you won't be able to view their surroundings through it."
Are you sure you want to quit?
"The device's screen is locked, so this feature is currently unavailable."
"Please note that when you use \"Screen Mirroring\", an icon indicating screen recording will appear at the top of your child's screen."
You have unbound %s. The restrictions on the device are removed but the Supervision Mode remains enabled. You can connect the device to AirDroid Parental Connector via a USB cable to disable it.
Download AirDroid Parental Connector via the link below:
"Please ensure your child's device (%s) is nearby and its screen is unlocked. Tap the button below to open AirDroid Kids"
Are you sure you want to quit the app?
"This email is an admin account and can't be invited as a family member"
"This account is already a member of another family account and can't be invited again"
This account is already a member of your family
"Sorry, the maximum number of family members has been reached. You can't add more family members."
You have been invited to join as a family member of account %s, which is not yet bound to any devices. Please contact the admin to bind devices.
The number of bound devices has exceeded the limit. Please request the admin to log into AirDroid Parental Control for assistance.
"Invite family members to join and monitor the child's device with you"
Are you sure you want to remove this family member?
"You've been sending emails too frequently. Please try again later."
Sorry, the subscription for admin account %s expired, so you can no longer perform any actions. Please contact the admin for renewal.
"After unbinding, you won't be able to monitor devices under account %s."
%s invites you to join the family group and co-manage devices.
The Admin can invite you to join the family group by sending invitations from [My] - [Family Members] after binding a device.
Focus Mode is turned on by your child and will be automatically turned off at %s. In Focus Mode, all apps will be blocked except the default Phone app.
You can no longer obtain the geofence data after deleting it. Are you sure you want to delete the geofence?
Set up a geofence to receive notifications when the device enters or exits the area.
The geofence name cannot be empty
"Couldn't load data. Refresh and try again"
"Remotely view screen activity and check surroundings via camera and microphone of the child's device."
"Discover your child's current and past locations, and receive alerts when they enter or leave the geofence."
"Set downtime and app limits on your child's devices."
Receive the notifications your child gets from any app.
"Receive alerts when sensitive keywords are detected in your child's social media apps."
"A browser designed for guardians and children, helping guardians effectively monitor children's internet browsing behavior."
Manage How Your Child Uses Device
"Check the App Notifications on Your Child's Device"
Watch the video to learn more about AirDroid Parental Control!
Unlock the full features via AirDroid Parental Connector
When turned on, all apps except those always allowed will be instantly blocked until the set time ends or this feature is manually turned off.
Failed to join the family group, please contact the Admin to invite you again.
Manage the apps and keywords to be monitored for sensitive content. You will receive alerts if any is detected.
Are you sure you want to delete %s%s%s?
Toggle on the categories you want to detect and receive alerts
Add keywords to receive alerts when the words are detected
"Select the language for the keywords you'd like to subscribe to"
"Please open AirDroid Kids on your child's device for an update."
New version of AirDroid Kids found
"You need to open and update the AirDroid Kids on your child's device to the latest version to access this feature."
Frequent location checks or refreshes will increase power consumption
The date is not in the available range
Location permission is required to access your location. Please grant location permission in the system settings.
When turned on, the device automatically records a location after moving the selected distance. The shorter the distance is, the sooner the battery drains.
Prevent your child from wirelessly transferring photos, videos, or files
Prevent your child from installing any new apps
Prevent your child from purchasing in-app or game items
Prevent your child from deleting any installed apps
Prevent your child from voice-controlling devices, including text messaging
Prevent your child from using Siri to search adult content
Prevent your child from using Siri on their device
Prevent your child from reading adult content on Apple Books
Block Explicit Content From Apple Books
Prevent your child from factory resetting the device
Restrict the data apps can collect
"Prevent your child from changing the device's password"
Prevent your child from taking screenshots and screen recording
Prevent your child from using iMessage
Password required for downloading app and in-app purchases
Notification permissions must be granted to ensure timely receipt of notifications and chat messages
For your privacy safety, the server only keeps the notifications data within 2 days
"When turned on, you'll receive the notifications from your child's device"
"The AirDroid Kids' icon will be automatically hidden after installation. You can open it using the following methods when needed."
"Not granting full permissions to the child's device will limit certain features"
"You haven't granted permission to Accessibility on the child's device"
"Precise Location permission required on the child's device"
"You haven't granted permission to app notifications on the child's device."
"You haven't allowed background pop-up notifications on the child's device"
"You haven't enabled Ignore Battery Optimization on the child's device"
"You haven't granted permission to the camera on the child's device"
"To recheck, please check the connectivity of the child's device or try opening AirDroid Kids on the device"
"You haven't granted permission to contacts on the child's device."
"You haven't granted Device Admin permission on the child's end"
"You haven't granted permission to device location on the child's device."
"You haven't granted permission to microphone on the child's device."
"AirDroid Kids is functioning properly on your child's device"
"You haven't granted permission to display over other apps on the child's device"
"You haven't granted permission to Phone on the child's device"
"You haven't allowed the app to keep permissions when not in use on the child's device"
"You haven't granted permission to SMS on the child's device."
"You haven't granted permission to screenshot on the child's device."
"You haven't granted permission to user usage on the child's device."
"The current device hasn't connected to the internet, please check."
The network is unstable. Please check your connection or try again later

"Before you continue to use our services, you have read and fully understood our Terms of Serivce and Privacy Policy. You expressly undertake to comply with the applicable laws and regulations in your territory during the use of the application. We care about the safety and welfare of children and value privacy. You agree and authorize our product to obtain data and information from your child's device."
The restriction has been removed via Admin Code: %s
The request has been approved via Admin Code: %s
The restriction has been removed via Admin Code
The request has been approved via Admin Code
%s has set the website as Always Allowed
The restriction is removed via Admin Code until midnight
%s has removed the restriction until midnight
%s has set the app as Always Allowed
The website has been set as Always Allowed via Admin Code
The app has been set as Always Allowed via Admin Code
The number of websites has reached the limits. Please delete unnecessary ones and try again
"A browser designed for parents and children, helping you better monitor your child's internet browsing behavior."
Block harmful internet content and sites, such as adult websites, violent content, etc., to keep your child safe online.
"Parents can view their child's browsing history, and block websites from it."
"Set up URL blacklist and whitelist to easily manage your child's access."
"You can configure and apply browser rules in AirDroid Parental Control to the AirDroid Browser on your child's device."
"Download and install AirDroid Browser on your child's device."
"Open AirDroid Browser on your child's device and follow the instructions to complete the setup."
You can use the code below to bind AirDroid Browser anytime, as it is always valid.
"Install AirDroid Browser from App Store on your child's device, or visit the URL below."
In Blacklist Mode, URLs in the subscribed categories are blocked.
Block custom URLs and the selected categories
"Adding URLs to the blacklist will block kids' access to them"
Are you sure you want to delete it?
Adding URLs here will always allow kids to access them
Can only access websites in the URL whitelist
The maintenance will complete as soon as possible, please try later.
"How to open the hidden AirDroid Kids on the child's device?"
Are you sure you want to delete this recording file? You cannot restore it after deletion.
"Please enter your password below to confirm unbinding this device. If you unbind, you will no longer have access to this device's information and will need to rebind."
Account not found. Please ensure this device is signed in to Google Play.
2. Set a password to have an alternative way to log into your account
1. Enter the verification code we sent to your email
Apps with more cellular data usage
"Augmented Supervision Mode enhances AirDroid Kids' security protection capability, preventing easy modification of its permissions or app uninstallation."
Unlock Augmented Supervision Mode via AirDroid Parental Connector
Choose apps to allow at all times
Set time limits or schedule downtime to make apps or categories inaccessible within a certain time frame.
Are you sure you want to return?
The schedule will be removed after deleting. Are you sure you want to delete it?
This app is currently allowed at all times. Would you like to disallow and block the app?
When turned on, all apps (except those always allowed) will be instantly blocked until you turn off this feature.
Turn on \"Geofence Area\" to apply the limit in the specific area.
Need to set the location information when selecting \"Geofence Area\"
App Limits has been turned off. Do you want to turn it on? After turning it on, all the app limits that you added will take effect.
Schedule a downtime, during which access to the app requires your permission.
Set total time of screen usage
Set a total usage limit. Once reached, access to the app requires your permission.
During downtime, only phone calls and the apps that you add to the Always Allowed will be available.
The end time cannot be the same as the start time
Please update to the latest version and try again
It is not available in Demo Mode, please register and sign in to your account to proceed.
The GPS signal is weak. Please try again.
The restriction will be removed after deleting. Are you sure you want to delete it?
Set time limits or schedule downtime to make websites inaccessible within a certain time frame.
Select the app you want to limit. (After selecting a category, the apps in it will be limited)
Apps that are added to \"Always Allowed\" are always available to use.
I have read and agree to %sAI Service Agreement%s
Analysis in progress. Look for your AI-powered report next week!
Weekly reports will be generated for each enabled device.
Weekly reports will be sent to the enabled email addresses every Sunday.
You can enable this later in Email Subscription
Start the timing immediately. It cannot be paused
To continue, please enter the password of AirDroid Parental Control.
Please make sure your codes match
"Set a 4-digit Admin Code to be used to directly approve requests on the child's device."
The image has expired or no longer available
Failed to load the image because it cannot be retrieved or the format is unsupported
Automatically save downloaded photos to Photos
"Please install the latest version of AirDroid Kids on %s's device to answer the voice call"
"Please install the latest version of AirDroid Parental Control on %s's device to answer the voice call"
"Please install the latest version of AirDroid Kids on %s's device to receive your messages"
"Please install the latest version of AirDroid Parental Control on %s's device to receive your messages"
Are you sure you want to prevent your child from using this app?
Not enabling precise location will result in inaccurate positioning and prevent your location from being displayed correctly on the map.
"This app (AirDroid Parental Control) is designed for parents. If this is your child's device and you want to %smanage%s it, please follow these steps:"
"Please install AirDroid Kids on your child's device to use this feature"
Are you sure you want to add this app to Always Allowed?
The following apps have been added to the Always Allowed. They will not be affected by App Limits or App Blocker.
The following websites have been added to the Always Allowed. They will not be affected by Website Restrictions or URL Blacklist.
The website has been added to the Always Allowed. It will not be affected by Website Restrictions.
Please add keywords first. You will receive alerts when they are detected in managed apps.
"AirDroid Kids Update Ready for Child's Device"
Precise Location is not enabled, so accurate positioning cannot be obtained.
Muting will prevent new notifications from this app.
"Successfully muted You can go to \"Notification Toggle\" for management"
"If you cannot find AirDroid Kids on your child's device, you can open it by visiting the following URL in the %sbrowser on your child's device%s."
"You can also enter the following key in the %sdial pad on your child's device%s to open it."
If not enabled, the newly installed apps will be blocked
The Time Limits feature is no longer available in Downtime. For similar functionalities, navigate to App Limits - All Apps and Categories.
Downtime no longer supports editing \"Time Limits.\" Existing schedules remain active but cannot be edited. To modify them, migrate them to App Limits.
Subscribe now to unlock all features!
Subscribe now and enjoy up to 14 days of free trial!
Please enter your AirDroid Parental Control password to verify your identity. Please note that for those devices that are not kept, data will be cleared and the devices will be unbound automatically.
Select devices you want to keep
Please select the bound devices that you want to keep, and the rest will be unbound automatically and the related data will be cleared.
Please write in more details so we can better help you
Enter your queries or suggestions (At least 10 characters)
Failed to sign out, please check your network and retry
Failed to remove the device. Please try again.
Failed to delete, please try again.

When searching for businesses or places near a location, Google Maps will show local results. Several factors - primarily relevance, distance and prominence - are combined to help find the best results for a search.
Too many password errors. Try again after 10 minutes!
Too many failed attempts. Try again after 10 minutes!
Account has logged in from other device
No application found to handle this action
External SD card access may be restricted
Failed to connect to Google service. Please check your network and retry.
"We're dealing your order, please wait few minutes and try later."
Failed to process your order. Please check your network and try again later.
AirDroid is keep running background to ensure devices wake up speed and connect stability under remote mode.
AirDroid Kids needs to run in the background for fast wake-up speed and stable connection during remote operation
Due to a recent change in Google Play policy, desktop notifications will no longer be supported for devices running Android 4.2 or lower. SMS and phone notifications are not affected.
Your password must include at least 8 characters, and the strength must be at least \"Medium\".
The password must contain at least 8 characters
The password must contain at least one character from two of the four types of character, uppercase, lowercase, numeric, and symbols
The password cannot contain spaces or special character
Please grant \"Camera\" permission for setting avatars
To ensure the proper functioning of both Files and File Transfer features, please enable the \"Storage\" permission
Failed to enable the %s permission. Please try to grant the permission through \"Settings > Apps\".
"* \"Phone\" permission failed to activate. If you've enabled, please try to disable this permission first, then make it enable."
Please write in more details (at lest 10 characters) so we can better help you
Install the top security app <font color=#48b94a> Trustlook Security</font> to protect your Android against virus.
Quick scan requires internet connection. Please check your network and try again later.
No network. Please try again later.
%1$s apps cannot be identified during Quick scan. Please try Deep scan.
Failed to purchase, current Google account has purchased AirDroid service items for other AirDroid account.
When using the Remote Camera feature, AirMirror will occupy your device camera. You cannot take pictures during this time.
2. Try waking up or unlocking the device
3. Please check if AirDroid is running on the phone
"Please enabled \"Remote Control\" related permissions through \"Me-Security & Remote Features\" on phone's AirDroid."
"Please enabled \"Camera\" related permissions through \"Me-Security & Remote Features\" on phone's AirDroid."
"Please enabled \"Screen Mirroring\" related permission through \"Me-Security & Remote Features\" on phone's AirDroid."
Check your network connection and try again later
Device OS version is too old to running AirMirror
Sorry, devices with Android OS version lower than 4.1 are not compatible.
Please upgrade AirDroid to the latest version on the remote device.(4.2.0.0+)
Sorry, \"Screen Mirroring\" cannot start. Refer to following steps to retry:
The Screenshot permission is not granted on the remote device, failed to acquire the device screen image.
If the authorization window is not displayed, please relaunch AirDroid
One-Way Audio allows you to listen to device surroundings through the device microphone. Please upgrade to Premium.
Apps in Downtime or blocked by the App Blocker are unavailable during this period
Your child requests to turn off Focus Mode
Installation incomplete. Please retry or install manually
"Install AirDroid Kids on your child's device"
Open AirDroid Kids and enter the code below
我已阅读并同意《用户条款》《隐私政策》
The connection has been disconnected. Please check the network
You can select up to %1$s files
The size of a single file cannot exceed %1$s
"AirDroid Kids is hidden on the receiver's device, so the app will not receive your messages and calls"
The line is currently busy. Please try again later
%1$s has left the family group and is unavailable for chat
Service abnormal, please try again later
Visit facebook.com/device and enter the code shown above.
Unexpected error while downloading an image.
To connect your account, open the Facebook app on your mobile device and check for notifications.
"You're in control - choose what info you want to share with apps."
Grant notification permissions to receive messages promptly
Only the last 3 months of data will be automatically backed up and synced
"%1$s won't work unless you enable Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device."
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device."
"%1$s won't run unless you update Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are currently updating."
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
Request timeout, please try again later
Upload failed. Tap to try again
Lose connection with the remote device
Caution! Your AirDroid Business account will also be deleted.
All bound %1$s device(s) will be UNBOUND, and CANNOT be recovered.
You will NOT be able to access remote support services anymore.
"You are【%1$s】Premium member. Deleting the account will make you unable to access any of AirDroid's services anymore. The account cannot be restored once deleted."

"You are【%1$s】Premium member and own business identity. Deleting the account will make you unable to access any of AirDroid's services anymore. The %2$s enrolled device(s) will be unenrolled and cannot be restored once the account is deleted."
"You are【%1$s】Premium member and own business identity. Deleting the account will make you unable to access any of AirDroid's services anymore. The account cannot be restored once deleted."
Once the account is deleted, you will not be able to use that account to log in to all AirDroid products, including AirDroid Business, AirDroid Remote Support, and GoInsight.AI.
Request to turn off Focus Mode
Network error. Please try again later.
Current mode: Repeat all. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat none. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat one. Toggle repeat mode.
Failed to delete account, please try again later
Continue to go back to end the call
Network error, check your connection and try again
The receiver may be busy. Please try again later
"This email hasn't signed up AirDroid account"
Send messages, transfer photos and any other files from any computer, without a USB cable.
"Sign in on the web and AirDroid will launch automatically on the device, even when it's not nearby."
Locate your device on a map. Lock it or wipe all data when you cannot get it back.
Manage your Android from a web browser, all over the air.
Premium user gets up to 1GB remote data transfer quota and can unlock all premium features.
No more same Wi-Fi restriction. Access your Android through different network with an AirDroid account.
Limited-Time Offer! Upgrade your Weekly Activity Report for free! Unlock in-depth summaries and personalized recommendations powered by AI.
Disables AI-powered insights on new data and stops new reports.
Analysis in progress. Your first AI-powered report will be delivered to you within 24 hours.
Delivers smart, tailored tips to help you parent with confidence.

"Committed to data minimization, we only analyze the data you approve to provide you with objective insights. This empowers you with a fact-based understanding of your child's digital world, so you can provide more informed care."
Spots behaviors like late-night usage or unusual searches to keep risks at bay.
"Turns complex data into easy-to-read reports on your child's digital activity."
Allow Apps to Request to Track
Too many password errors. Try again in 10 minutes!
Failed to sign in. Email or password is incorrect.
Failed to sign in. Please check your network.
Only apps on the \"Always Allowed\" list are available during this period

Set App Limits, such as time limits or scheduled limits, to help your child balance on- and off-screen time.
Add apps to the Always Allowed list to avoid overly restrictive rules, ensuring your child can always use essential applications.
Schedule Downtime to create a distraction-free environment for study or rest.
Use AirDroid Parental Control to set screen time rules and app limits, helping your child build healthy digital habits.
